goal: Verify Planner correctly classifies representative tasks into all four complexity tiers
description: Planner should emit complexity_tier = TRIVIAL for ≤2 file single-concern tasks, SMALL for 3–5 file single-domain tasks, MEDIUM for 6–15 file cross-domain tasks, and LARGE for 15+ file cross-cutting tasks. Each input is a canonical representative example for its tier.

input.task_description: Add email validation to the user registration endpoint: update the request DTO, the controller guard, and the corresponding unit test (3 files, single domain)

Add cursor-based pagination to the /api/users endpoint: update controller, service, repository, database query helper, OpenAPI spec, integration test suite, and API client SDK (7 files spanning API layer, data layer, and documentation)
Migrate authentication from session-based to JWT across all services, agent files, schemas, and CI configuration
